security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Predict MLB games using Bill James' Pythagorean Expectation
bundle.longDescription: An educational desktop app that explains and applies the Pythagorean Expectation model to predict MLB game outcomes. Built with Rust and Tauri; data from the MLB Stats API.
